chain.thought: Explanation: She finished in the top 10 in 2001 (4th), 2002 (2nd), 2005 (2nd and 6th), 2006 (1st, 2nd, 7th), and 2007 (1st). The consecutive year streaks are 2001–2002 (2 years) and 2005–2007 (3 years). The longest consecutive streak is 3 years.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
Identify years with a top-10 finish (position 1–10 in any event that year):
- 2001: 4th (top 10) → yes
- 2002: 2nd (top 10) → yes
- 2005: 2nd and 6th (top 10) → yes
- 2006: 1st, 2nd, and 7th (top 10) → yes
- 2007: 1st (top 10) → yes
- 2011: dq → no

Consecutive-year streaks of top-10 finishes:
- 2001–2002: 2 years
- 2005–2007: 3 years

The longest consecutive streak is 3 years.
